revision_priority: Eliminate the R0 traceability break by adding `Embedded Linux` and `Network Protocol` to Skills or rewriting the TikTok bullets to stay within existing skills.
Rewrite the summary and one TikTok bullet to lead with Neuron-relevant profiling/monitoring/performance-tooling evidence instead of the analytics-transition framing.
revision_instructions: Make three targeted edits. 1) Fix the R0 mismatch by either adding `Embedded Linux` and `Network Protocol` to `## Skills` or rewriting the TikTok security bullets so every technical term already exists in Skills. 2) Reframe `Professional Summary` so sentence 1 leads with backend/platform/tooling ownership and performance-oriented work, and move the analytics transition out of the opening line. 3) Remove bold from low-signal modifiers such as `team-maintained`, `internal`, `controlled`, and `lightweight`, while keeping bold only on technologies, metrics, and section headers.
